title: Xtra-Crispy Argentinian Duck Confit Leg
description: A diabetic-friendly, high-protein Argentinian dish featuring confit duck leg with jammy confit tomato, perfect for post-workout meal.
instructions: Season the duck leg confit with smoked paprika, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Sear the duck leg confit until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and confit for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
While the duck leg confit is cooking, confit the tomatoes in a separate saucepan over low heat for 30 minutes.
After 2 hours, remove the duck leg confit from the oven and add the confit tomatoes to the Dutch oven.
Return the Dutch oven to the oven and continue to confit for an additional 30 minutes.
Remove the duck leg confit from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the duck leg confit with the confit tomatoes and garnish with fresh parsley, if desired.
